candidates.snippet: ypeface commonly found on historical buildings in the city of London. This elegant serif font was originally created in 2003 for the Arnolfini Gallery’s exhibition, ‘Apparition: the Action of Appearing’. Monday Light Mon

Sorbian, Vunjo, Walloon, Welsh, Western Frisian, Wolof, Xhosa, Zulu Manufacturer: A2-TYPE Designer: Henrik Kubel Year: 2015 Copyright: © A2-TYPE Trademark: Monday is a trademark of A2-TYPE Licence: Terms and conditions
